rule CDB_CVE202621765__HCL_BigFix_Platform_is_aff {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-21765 - HCL BigFix Platform is affected by insecure permissions on priv"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-02"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-21765" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "BigFix" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-21765 - HCL BigFix Platform is affected by insecure"; content:"CVE-2026-21765"; nocase; sid:9005834; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-34751 - Payload has Unvalidated Input in Password R"; content:"CVE-2026-34751"; nocase; sid:2600470; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-34875 - Mbed TLS FFDH Key Export Buffer Overflow"; content:"CVE-2026-34875"; nocase; sid:8379555; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-35093 - Libinput: libinput: unauthorized code execu"; content:"CVE-2026-35093"; nocase; sid:7743215; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
